title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sobha Developers Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sobha Developers Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers Holdings Services:
Sobha Developers Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
